description_long: This is a compact, two-seater sofa with a deep, rich dark color, likely a dark brown or black. The sofa features a gently curved backrest and armrests that rise smoothly from the seat, creating a unified and inviting silhouette. The seat and back cushions are visibly plush and appear to be integrated into the frame, providing a seamless look. The armrests are moderately high and curve outward slightly, adding to the sofa's comfort and style. The legs are short, dark, and positioned at the corners, barely visible beneath the base, giving the sofa a grounded and stable appearance. The upholstery is solid in color with a matte, soft finish, and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A compact, dark-colored two-seater sofa with curved armrests, integrated cushions, and a smooth, matte finish. The design is simple, modern, and inviting.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seat cushions, a continuous backrest, and gently curved armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's curved armrest and the thickness of the seat and backrest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, unadorned backrest and the sofa's overall width.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring the armrest curve and cushion depth seen in view 1.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two seat cushions and a single continuous back cushion, all attached and uniform in size, with no visible separation or tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Curved, moderately high armrests that rise smoothly from the seat and curve outward, fully upholstered with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, dark legs positioned at the corners, simple block style, slightly recessed and minimally visible.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous backrest with a gentle curve, fully upholstered and integrated with the frame, no tufting or segmentation.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color upholstery with a smooth, matte texture and no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
